message:
feat(normalize): add wrapper prefix stripping module (git_safety_guard-99e.12)

Add new normalize module that strips common wrapper prefixes so destructive
patterns match consistently regardless of how commands are invoked.

Supported wrappers:
- sudo with options (-E, -H, -n, -k, -K, -S, -b, -u, -g, -h, -p)
- env with options and NAME=VALUE assignments
- command wrapper (but NOT query mode -v/-V)
- Leading backslash alias bypass (\git, \rm)

The module returns both original and normalized forms for explain output,
and tracks which wrappers were stripped for debugging purposes.

Includes 15 unit tests covering all wrapper types and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
